meaning: 约翰斯敦[美国宾夕法尼亚州西南部城市](1889年时曾受特大洪水之灾)
examples: He grew up near Johnstown and owned a car wash.
It was a natural funnel, pointed directly downhill at Johnstown.
IF YOU require a monument to the late Congressman John Murtha, just look around Johnstown in western Pennsylvania.
There you can try the intestacy calculator created by Johnstown, Pa. estate lawyer Kurt R.
In 1889, more than 2, 000 people perished when a dam break sent water rushing through Johnstown, Pennsylvania.
